hero.description: I'm Dev Kumar, a Full Stack Developer from India who enjoys building scalable web applications, solving complex problems using Data Structures & Algorithms, and exploring Web3 technologies.

education.title: Education
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: I have experience with technologies such as React.js, Node.js, , web3 and blockchain, system design , and C++.

projects.title: Modern E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full stack e-commerce application built using React, Node.js, Express, and SQL. It includes user authentication, product management, shopping cart functionality, and secure checkout.

projects.title: Restaurant & Food Delivery System
projects.description: A scalable system similar to Zomato that manages restaurants, orders, and payments using design patterns such as Factory, Strategy, and Singleton.

projects.title: Smart Dashboard System
projects.description: An interactive dashboard that displays analytics and system data in real time using API integrations.

projects.title: Crypto Dashboard
projects.description: A web application that fetches cryptocurrency data from APIs and displays real-time prices with secure API key handling.

description: Developed scalable web applications using React, Node.js, and Express.
Built REST APIs and integrated backend services with modern frontend frameworks.
Collaborated with development teams to improve performance and implement new features.

contact.title: About
contact.description:
Hello, I'm Dev Kumar, a Computer Science student at Narula Institute of Technology graduating in 2027. I am passionate about Full Stack Development, Data Structures & Algorithms, and Web3 technologies.

I have experience building scalable web applications using React, Node.js, Express, Django, and SQL. I also enjoy solving algorithmic challenges using C++ and learning system design concepts.

Currently, I am working as a Full Stack Developer Intern at Future Inters and focusing on improving my backend architecture and blockchain development skills.
contact.contact_message: I'm open to new opportunities, internships, and collaborations. Feel free to reach out!
